items.title: VGGT-Edit: Feed-forward Native 3D Scene Editing with Residual Field Prediction
items.summary: Researchers introduce VGGT-Edit, a novel method for native 3D scene editing that uses a feed-forward network with residual field prediction, offering efficient and high-quality results.

items.title: Apple’s Siri revamp could include auto-deleting chats
items.summary: Apple is reportedly planning a significant overhaul for Siri, potentially introducing privacy-enhancing features like auto-deleting chat histories.

items.title: Why trust is a big question at the Elon Musk-OpenAI trial
items.summary: The ongoing legal battle between Elon Musk and OpenAI highlights fundamental questions of trust, ethics, and the founding principles of AI development.

items.title: ATLAS: Agentic or Latent Visual Reasoning? One Word is Enough for Both
items.summary: ATLAS proposes a new approach to visual reasoning, exploring whether agentic or latent methods are more effective and demonstrating a unified solution.

items.title: FrontierSmith: Synthesizing Open-Ended Coding Problems at Scale
items.summary: FrontierSmith presents a new method for generating a large volume of diverse and open-ended coding problems, which could significantly aid in AI agent training and software engineering education.

items.title: Learning to Communicate Locally for Large-Scale Multi-Agent Pathfinding
items.summary: This research explores efficient local communication strategies for multi-agent systems to solve large-scale pathfinding problems, crucial for robotics and logistics.

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in April 2026
items.summary: Google provides a comprehensive recap of its significant AI advancements and product updates released throughout April 2026.

items.title: I Ran AI Models Directly in the Browser and Measured What It Did to Core Web Vitals
items.summary: An experiment details the performance impact of running AI models directly within a web browser on critical web performance metrics, offering insights for web developers.

items.title: IntentVLA: Short-Horizon Intent Modeling for Aliased Robot Manipulation
items.summary: IntentVLA introduces a method for robots to model short-term human intent, improving manipulation tasks where objects or actions might be ambiguous.

items.title: DiffusionOPD: A Unified Perspective of On-Policy Distillation in Diffusion Models
items.summary: DiffusionOPD offers a unified framework for understanding and applying on-policy distillation techniques within diffusion models, potentially enhancing their training and performance.

items.title: PanoWorld: Towards Spatial Supersensing in 360^circ Panorama World
items.summary: PanoWorld explores advanced spatial understanding in 360-degree panoramic environments, aiming for 'supersensing' capabilities in immersive AI applications.

items.title: ViMU: Benchmarking Video Metaphorical Understanding
items.summary: ViMU introduces a new benchmark specifically designed to evaluate how well AI models can understand metaphorical concepts within video content.

items.title: CodeGraph: Stop Your AI Agent From Grepping the Same Files 50 Times
items.summary: CodeGraph proposes a solution to optimize AI agent efficiency by preventing redundant file searches, improving performance in code-related tasks.

items.title: Autonomous AI research for nanogpt speedrun
items.summary: This article discusses efforts to accelerate AI research using autonomous AI agents, specifically in the context of optimizing nanoGPT development.

items.title: What Coding Is Starting to Lose
items.summary: This piece reflects on the evolving nature of software development, discussing how the increasing role of AI might be changing the essence of coding itself.
